ddls:
CREATE TABLE "archetypes" (
  "archetype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archetype */,
  "archetype_name" TEXT /* Name of the archetype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the archetype */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the archetype */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the archetype was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the archetype */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the archetype was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archetype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature (GO term) */,
  "archetype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the archetype the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (GO term) */,
  "p_value_mann_whitney" REAL /* P-value from the Mann-Whitney U test */,
  "median_difference" REAL /* Median difference between groups */,
  "mean_difference" REAL /* Mean difference between groups */,
  "significant_after_bh_correction" INTEGER /* Whether the feature is significant after Benjamini-Hochberg correction */,
  "is_first_bin_maximal" INTEGER /* Whether the first bin is maximal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_archetype_id FOREIGN KEY ("archetype_id") REFERENCES archetypes ("archetype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the annotation */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_publications" (
  "feature_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature-publication mapping */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_publications_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, FASTA) */,
  "md5_hash" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_versions" (
  "feature_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature version */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_versions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the session ended */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_tags" (
  "feature_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature-tag mapping */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_tags_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_comments" (
  "feature_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature-comment mapping */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment associated with the feature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_comments_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
